codemirror.js + codemirror.css (lib/) and foldcode.js + foldgutter.js +
brace-fold.js + foldgutter.css (addon/fold/) vendored verbatim from the
codemirror npm package, version 5.65.18, MIT license (see LICENSE alongside).
Consumed only by studio.html's source ⇄ .phos review popup. To re-vendor:
npm install codemirror@5.65.18, copy those files here, npm uninstall
codemirror.
